caption: A person wearing a dark grey long-sleeved shirt uses their hands to manipulate a silver metal crafting die over a variety of scrapbooking and card-making supplies. The setting is a tabletop display featuring a product line titled "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE" and "FROSTED FRAMES 5 DIES." On the table, there are sample cards, decorative papers in shades of blue and purple, and various die-cut shapes. The person holds the intricate metal die by its edge, moving it across the surface. As the sequence progresses, the hand shifts the position of the die, sliding it downward and slightly to the left. The background includes promotional materials with text and images of the finished products, alongside a black cardstock piece featuring a delicate gold floral cutout and a small red heart.
